story.text: > The needle that returns to the same point sixty-four times does not merely mend a tear; it anchors the fabric of reality to the intent of the tailor.
Tier **dragon** · Stratum 6/6 · Hex `3F` · undefined nodes · 64 laps · undefined spells cast · charge **inferno**
**Significance.** The mathematical peak. 64 laps — one per vertex of the lattice. Anchors the fabric of reality so it cannot be moved. The 7th Capital reclaimed through maximum temporal intensity.
